title: Fell small trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Fell small trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assist in preparation of worksite

pcs.text: Identify location of worksite and correct tree from scope of works, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify location of worksite and correct tree from scope of works, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify location of worksite and correct tree from scope of works, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify site hazards, assess risks and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm work zone with work crew, and monitor site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work zone with work crew, and monitor site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work zone with work crew, and monitor site.

pcs.text: Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document and implement site health and safety in the workplace, environmental and traffic control measures according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assist in preparation of worksite

elements.title: Identify tree felling requirements

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks relevant to felling operation, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks relevant to felling operation, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks relevant to felling operation, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Examine topography and site conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine topography and site conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine topography and site conditions.

pcs.text: Identify factors influencing the tree felling operation, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify factors influencing the tree felling operation, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors influencing the tree felling operation, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify trees considered outside own skill level for felling, and seek assistance from appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify trees considered outside own skill level for felling, and seek assistance from appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify trees considered outside own skill level for felling, and seek assistance from appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Determine natural direction of fall, safe fall zone and exclusion zone, and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine natural direction of fall, safe fall zone and exclusion zone, and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine natural direction of fall, safe fall zone and exclusion zone, and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm tree felling operations and instructions with supervisor prior to undertaking work
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm tree felling operations and instructions with supervisor prior to undertaking work?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm tree felling operations and instructions with supervisor prior to undertaking work.

elements.title: Prepare for tree felling

pcs.text: Select and prepare felling equipment and component options appropriate to the task being undertaken

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare felling equipment and component options appropriate to the task being undertaken.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare, transport and position support tools to minimise felling delays.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain safety and personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use safety equipment and PPE applicable to the task being undertaken.

pcs.text: Clear fall zone of obstacles and articles that may be damaged by felled tree

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate with work team during operations using voice, hand or whistle signals.

pcs.text: Determine standard tree felling techniques, patterns and cut sequences by ground conditions and state of canopy

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine standard tree felling techniques, patterns and cut sequences by ground conditions and state of canopy.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take corrective action in response to changing conditions or problems encountered.

pcs.text: Use planned escape route when tree starts to fall

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use planned escape route when tree starts to fall.

pcs.text: Monitor fall of tree and movement on ground until felled tree is stable

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor fall of tree and movement on ground until felled tree is stable.
